title: EX-0004 pond-board UI and art expansion
goal: Transform the validated EX-0004 orthogonal frog-jump graybox into a polished pond-board interface inspired by the supplied references while preserving the exact square unit grid, established mechanic, accessibility routes, and bridge scope.
acceptance: The playfield reads as a coherent East Asian garden-inspired pond board using original SVG/CSS art rather than copied branded characters or layouts.
Every visible movement cell remains a true square and every ordinary horizontal or vertical jump remains exactly one cell side; the obstacle jump remains two unit lengths in one action.
Tutorial, horizontal prediction, vertical transfer, and obstacle rounds retain their existing interaction semantics and deterministic smoke hooks.
The UI remains readable and operable by keyboard, touch at 320px, and reduced-motion users without horizontal overflow.
EX-0004 DESIGN.md records the visual rationale, preserved mechanic invariants, and validation evidence without claiming MES-02 contract approval or pupil efficacy.
must_ask_if: Acceptance criteria conflict or require product intent not present in this slice.
The validated prediction, automatic-resolution, orthogonal-transfer, or two-unit obstacle mechanic would need to change.
A new runtime dependency, external network asset, copied branded character, or copied board composition appears necessary.
Any file outside the declared EX-0004 exercise directory must change.
